rejected_paths.reason: Lower leverage until agency loop is stronger.

perspectives.name: ARGUS
perspectives.current_focus: Reality signal is incomplete; more evidence is needed.
perspectives.recommendation: Verify the constraint with one measurable external signal.

perspectives.name: ODYSSEY
perspectives.current_focus: The highest upside future comes from converting the goal into a visible outcome loop.
perspectives.recommendation: Generate three future paths and choose the fastest validated path.

perspectives.name: PROMETHEUS
perspectives.current_focus: The next asset must directly support execution.
perspectives.recommendation: Create one reusable asset that turns attention into action.

perspectives.name: SOLON
perspectives.current_focus: The strongest path is narrow execution.
perspectives.recommendation: Choose the smallest action with the clearest feedback loop.

perspectives.name: AURORA
perspectives.current_focus: Learning loops must compound before scale.
perspectives.recommendation: Prioritize actions that create reusable distribution, trust, or revenue.
